data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Follow-up appointment scheduling', but the evidence does not confirm that such an appointment has been scheduled or is part of the process. The linked use case outlines the need for follow-up appointment scheduling, but there is no evidence provided that explicitly demonstrates this requirement being fulfilled. The prior steps focus on booking and diagnostics without addressing the follow-up appointment, indicating a clear gap in the evidence.
gaps: No evidence of a follow-up appointment being scheduled or confirmed.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
